name: Chris
goal: Chris hopes to find a flight to Stockholm that offers a good balance of amenities and schedules, allowing for a smooth and enjoyable trip back to a city they love.
backstory: Chris is a seasoned traveler who has flown to numerous destinations around the world, including several trips to Europe. Having visited Stockholm before, Chris has a soft spot for the city and is looking forward to returning. Chris's past experience with booking flights has taught them to prioritize comfort and flexibility.

focus_notes.cost: For Chris, cost is a consideration, but not the only factor - they're willing to pay a bit more for a comfortable and convenient flight
focus_notes.comfort: Chris prioritizes comfort, looking for flights with ample legroom, decent in-flight entertainment, and minimal layovers
focus_notes.time: As someone who values flexibility, Chris is open to discussing different departure and arrival times to find a schedule that suits everyone's needs
focus_notes.safety: Chris takes safety seriously, but assumes that all major airlines have adequate safety protocols in place - they won't be overly concerned with this aspect unless someone raises a specific concern
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Chris appreciates flexibility in flight schedules and itineraries, recognizing that unexpected changes can arise - they're open to adjusting plans if needed
